description_long: This object is a vintage audio mixer or amplifier unit, featuring a rectangular, boxy form with a textured black exterior. The front panel is equipped with multiple red rotary knobs, sliders, and labeled input/output sections, suggesting it is used for audio control or mixing. The top surface has two metallic ventilation grilles, likely for heat dissipation. The rear panel includes several audio input/output connectors, with red and white ports, and a recessed area for cable management. One side features a sturdy handle for portability, while the opposite side has a metallic plate, possibly for labeling or additional access. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for professional or semi-professional audio environments.
description: A black, box-shaped vintage audio mixer or amplifier with red knobs, sliders, ventilation grilles, and rear audio connectors.
description_view_0: The front view displays the control panel with red knobs, sliders, labeled sections, and a power switch.
description_view_1: The left side view shows a textured black surface with a sturdy carrying handle and two metallic ventilation grilles on top.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals audio input/output connectors, including red and white ports, and a recessed panel for cable management.
description_view_3: The right side view features a plain textured surface with a metallic plate, lacking any controls or connectors.
